name: campus-intelligence-dashboard
description: Unified Campus Intelligence Dashboard with AI Assistant - MARS Open Projects 2026

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix mcp-servers/library && npm install --prefix mcp-servers/cafeteria && npm install --prefix mcp-servers/events && npm install --prefix mcp-servers/academics && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n LIBRARY,CAFETERIA,EVENTS,ACADEMICS,BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,yellow,magenta,green,red,cyan "npm start --prefix mcp-servers/library" "npm start --prefix mcp-servers/cafeteria" "npm start --prefix mcp-servers/events" "npm start --prefix mcp-servers/academics" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
